title: Ayenia irwinii
taxonomy: Ayenia irwinii is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It belongs to the genus Ayenia, which is a group of plants native to the Americas. Within the Malpighiaceae family, Ayenia irwinii is classified as a member of the order Malpighiales. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaves and flowers, which are typical of the Malpighiales order. The Malpighiales order is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that are found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world.
